title: Kyle And Jackie O Axed, Aussies Abandoned In Middle East, Tourette's Public Abuse | 10 News+
description: As the US-Iran conflict continues, questions are being raised over whether US President Donald Trump has a long-term plan.  An Aussie grandmother running out of medication is just one of an estimated 115,000 Aussies stranded in the Middle East.  There has been no communication from the Federal Government on whether they will help fly them home, despite other countries already running repatriation flights. title: Israel Invades Lebanon, Jackie O Quits, Oscar Piastri In Melbourne | 10’s Late News
description: Tonight on 10’s Late News – Israel launches a ground invasion of Lebanon, Jackie O has quit the KIIS FM breakfast show after an on-air feud with Kyle Sandilands, an 8-year-old Australian girl has been killed in a snowmobile accident in Japan, a Sydney homeowner has survived an attempted shooting at his front door,  an armed man has been shot dead by police in Sydney, F1 driver Oscar Piastri has landed in his hometown of Melbourne ahead of the Australian Grand Prix, a Perth restaurant owner has been fined after a family was served insect repellant instead of cranberry juice, Bill and Hillary Clinton continue to adamantly deny any knowledge of sex-offender Jeffrey Epstein’s crimes, France is set to grow its nuclear warhead arsenal for the first time since the Cold War, more than 115,000 Australians remain stranded in the Middle East, a ‘Jeffrey Epstein Walk of Shame’ has popped up just a few steps away from the White House, and a United Airlines plane has been forced to make an emergency landing after fears of a catastrophic engine fire.
